explanation.description: One or two sentences diagnosing the root cause of the failures.

confidence.description: How confident Claude is that these fixes will resolve the failures.

fixes.description: Ordered list of code changes to apply. Apply in order — later fixes may depend on earlier ones.

file.description: Relative path to the file to modify.

line.description: 1-indexed line number in the file where the original text begins. Used to anchor the replacement to the correct occurrence.

description.description: One sentence explaining why this change fixes the failure.

original.description: The exact string to find and replace, anchored by the line number.

replacement.description: The string to substitute in place of original.
